nodes.name: e2e-cassandra-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a Cassandra container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's Cassandra sink connector functionality.

nodes.name: e2e-clickhouse-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a ClickHouse container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's ClickHouse sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-deltalake-sink-rust-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a MinIO/S3 environment and runs SLT tests for the native Rust Delta Lake sink connector, verifying written Parquet files.

nodes.name: check_delta_table
nodes.summary: Verifies Delta Lake table contents using the deltalake Python CLI after a sink test run, asserting row counts and data correctness.

nodes.name: e2e-doris-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts an Apache Doris container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's Doris sink connector.

nodes.name: create_doris_table
nodes.summary: Creates the target Doris table and database for sink testing using the Doris MySQL-compatible HTTP API.

nodes.name: e2e-elasticsearch-sink-ci-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Elasticsearch sink that runs only the CI-specific subset of tests (skipping tests requiring external auth).

nodes.name: e2e-elasticsearch-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts an Elasticsearch container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's Elasticsearch sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-iceberg-sink-cdc-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that tests the Iceberg sink with CDC sources, starting Kafka and MinIO/Lakekeeper and verifying data written to Iceberg tables.

nodes.name: verify_iceberg_source
nodes.summary: Verifies Iceberg sink data by reading back from the Iceberg table as a source and comparing results against expected values.

nodes.name: e2e-iceberg-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Iceberg sink and source functionality, running SLT tests against a MinIO-backed Iceberg catalog.

nodes.name: e2e-jdbc-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for JDBC sink connector, starting a PostgreSQL container and running SLT tests through the Java connector node.

nodes.name: e2e-kafka-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for Kafka sink connector, starting Kafka and running comprehensive SLT tests covering upsert, append, and schema registry modes.

nodes.name: e2e-ldap-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for LDAP authentication in RisingWave, starting an OpenLDAP container and verifying user authentication and authorization.

nodes.name: e2e-mongodb-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a MongoDB container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's MongoDB sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-monitoring-tests.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that runs monitoring-specific tests verifying Prometheus metrics are correctly exported and Grafana dashboards load.

nodes.name: e2e-mqtt-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts an MQTT broker container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's MQTT sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-postgres-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a PostgreSQL container and runs SLT tests verifying the native Postgres sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-pulsar-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts an Apache Pulsar container and runs SLT tests verifying the Pulsar sink connector.

nodes.name: e2e-redis-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script that starts a Redis container and runs SLT tests verifying RisingWave's Redis sink connector, including upsert and append modes.

nodes.name: e2e-sink-test.sh
nodes.summary: Generic CI e2e sink test script that runs sink-related SLT tests for connectors not requiring dedicated external services.

nodes.name: e2e-source-cdc-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for CDC (Change Data Capture) source connectors, running SLT tests for MySQL and PostgreSQL CDC sources.

nodes.name: e2e-source-cron-only-test.sh
nodes.summary: CI e2e test script for cron-triggered source tests that only run on the nightly schedule, not on every PR.
